title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Build the domain model and basic URL shortening logic, including unit tests.
steps.done_condition: Domain model code is implemented with passing unit tests.

steps.description: Define the ports for URL shortening and retrieval functionalities.
steps.done_condition: Port interfaces are defined and documented.

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage for URL shortening operations.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage adapter is implemented and integrated with domain logic.

steps.description: Develop the REST API interface for URL shortening and retrieval.
steps.done_condition: REST API is developed and connected to the in-memory storage.

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports first, then secondary adapters, followed by primary adapters.
successCriteria: URL shortener functionality is fully implemented.
All unit tests for domain logic pass.
API endpoints are functional and tested.
